success_factors: Workflow completed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize) with overall status=success
Low-intrusiveness import-first strategy with CLI fallback was identified as feasible (confidence ~0.89)
Repository structure and core modules were correctly discovered (model loading, FASTA parsing, inverse folding, fold/extract scripts)
Generated MCP plugin started healthy over stdio and passed plugin-level health checks
failure_reasons: Quality gaps remain: original project tests did not run/pass in this execution, DeepWiki analysis failed, and generated endpoint set contains naming collisions/duplication
Observability/performance metrics are effectively missing (reported as zeros), limiting runtime diagnostics confidence

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully via zip fallback; timing not broken out, but overall duration suggests download was not the dominant bottleneck.
node_performance.analysis_time: Analysis succeeded on a large tree (~428 files) and produced useful module/CLI mapping; likely moderate share of runtime.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation completed and produced expected scaffold files, but output metadata (LOC/size/tools count=0) indicates incomplete instrumentation or post-generation accounting.
node_performance.test_time: Plugin health test passed quickly; original project tests were not effectively executed (execution_time=0), so validation depth is limited.
